Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class LightningUriEventStream

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.LightningUriEventStream
public class LightningUriEventStream extends SObject

Java class for LightningUriEventStream complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="LightningUriEventStream">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AppName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConnectionType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeviceId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeviceModel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DevicePlatform" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeviceSessionId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Duration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EffectivePageTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EffectivePageTimeDeviationErrorType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EffectivePageTimeDeviationReason" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventUuid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasEffectivePageTimeDeviation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LoginKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Operation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OsName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OsVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PageStartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PageUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PreviousPageAppName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PreviousPageEntityId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PreviousPageEntityType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PreviousPageUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="QueriedEntities" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedEventIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReplayId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SdkAppType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SdkAppVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SdkVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionLevel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceIp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="User" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserAgent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Username" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
